topic.title: Enterprise Conditional Processing Heavy Topic
topic.shortdesc: Heavy conditional topic for stress and filtering tests. Target: 6000+ lines.

body.p: This topic is generated for performance, scalability, source/author rendering, save/load latency, and profiling/filtering stress tests. It contains many sections with audience, platform, and otherprops attributes.
